description: Style NoteDesigned for people who never compromise on style and comfort, the Skate Board shoe from lotto comes with a durable synthetic upper and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you safe and stable on various surfaces.Product DetailsGrey shoe with central lace-ups, overlays, perforations and reinforced overlay at the heel counterPadded and meshed inner and tongueThick rubber outsoleTPU outsole with herringbone groovesMaterial and CareSynthetic and rubberWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
